title: Part 1: Turn Parsing and PID Process Tracking
description: Implement turn parsing in Python and PID tracking in run_antigravity.sh. Ref: work_reports/tasks_subdivision/1_turn_parsing_and_pid_tracking.md
result: Implemented turn-based parsing in transcript_parser.py using turn block segmentation and PID process tracking with EXIT trap in run_antigravity.sh. Verified creation and clean deletion of run.pid during execution and termination.
